title: 1.1: Consolidates the duplicated base and head commit resolution logic in normalizeConfig into reusable helper functions in pkg/sources/git/git.go
1.2: Preserves branch name resolution in normalizeConfig that updates hash fields when non-hash references are provided
1.3: Preserves merge base calculation in normalizeConfig between resolved commit references
1.4: Formats the ScanRepo completion log message as multi-line for better readability
1.5: Includes the remote repository URL in the ScanRepo completion log message
1.6: Adds nil checks for both repo and ref parameters, where ref is passed as a pointer
1.7: Surfaces the 2 previously silently ignored CommitObject errors (base commit, head commit resolution) in normalizeConfig
1.8: Separates merge base error handling in normalizeConfig into distinct error messages for actual errors vs empty results
2.1: Adds documentation for both normalizeConfig and resolveAndSetCommit functions in pkg/sources/git/git.go
4.1: Removes error handling for base or head commit resolution in normalizeConfig in pkg/sources/git/git.go
4.2: Removes the remote repository URL from the ScanRepo completion log message in pkg/sources/git/git.go
